subcodes.first_line: O thou praiseworthy branch of the Blessed Tree, beloved companion, when like a ravishing beauty thou didst appear in the gathering of the lovers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع المحمود من الشجره المبارکه دلبر مهربان چون شاهد انجمن گشت عاشقان
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @justice and wrath of God
